name: Pecan Filled Angel Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 quart butter pecan ice cream, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cake on a baking sheet or heavy foil.
2. Using an electric knife, slice off about 1 inch from the top of the cake and set aside.
3. Make a hollow in the center of the cake by cutting down into it about 1 inch from both the outer edge and the middle hole, leaving a substantial 1-inch base at the bottom.
4. Remove excess cake to form a cavity.
5. Spoon ice cream into the cavity in the cake; replace the top of the cake and press down gently against the ice cream.
6. Wrap the cake in foil and place it in the freezer until firm but not hard (about 2 hours).
7. In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until soft peaks form.
8. Gradually add sugar while continuing to whip until stiff peaks form.
9. Frost the top and sides of the cake with sweetened whipped cream.
10. Garnish with chopped pecans.
11. Place back in the freezer for at least 1/2 hour before serving.
12. Cut into wedges using an electric knife.
